name: KV cache for incremental attention
task: Create /tmp/eval_kv/kv_cache.py with a class KVCache that supports incremental attention. Constructor takes no args. Methods: append(K_step, V_step) where K_step and V_step are 1D lists representing the new token's key/value vectors (size d_k and d_v); attend(Q_step) where Q_step is a 1D list of size d_k, returns a 1D list of size d_v computed as: softmax((Q_step · K_i) / sqrt(d_k) for each cached step i) @ V_cached. After T calls to append + attend, the result of the T-th call must equal the result of doing full scaled dot-product attention from scratch over all T cached keys/values. Numerically stable softmax. Pure Python.
